response.step_by_step_log: The video was analyzed, and a song performance was identified. The on-screen text at the beginning of the song (00:26) listed 'Ready Steady' and 'Lyrics/Music: Giga'. A web search was conducted using the query '"Ready Steady" Giga Japanese and English lyrics'. The search results confirmed the song title, original producer (Giga), and provided the lyrics. The scene was mapped from the start of the music (00:26) to the end of the musical segment (04:04).
response.global_summary: A concert performance of the song "Ready Steady" performed by the group hololive English -Promise-.

scenes.description: The group hololive English -Promise- performs the song "Ready Steady" on a concert stage.
scenes.reference_lyrics_og:
ローリスクじゃ物足りなくなっちゃったし
有り余って笑っちゃうくらい
なんも無いなんて言ったってしょうがないし
